_meta.author: Claude, Anthropic
_meta.purpose: Reference test graph for implementers. Exercises all major node types, verification levels, threat scenarios, and protocol behaviors. All DIDs, keys, and signatures are synthetic placeholders; do not use in production.

A_to_M.description: Individual (Level-1) to organization executive (Level-2). Human-only path.
A_to_M.notes: Org gateway (acme-gateway) adds 1 mandatory internal hop. Margaret is the designated contact.

A_to_M_with_proxy.description: Same endpoints, but Alice and Margaret have both opted in to proxy-claude.
A_to_M_with_proxy.notes: AI proxy reduces path length by 1 by skipping carol+frank. Requires dual opt-in to be valid.

B_to_N.description: Level-0 unverified node attempts to reach Level-2 target.
B_to_N.expected_behavior: Carol's policy allows Level-0 forwarding with vouch. Frank's policy allows cross-bridge relay. Bridge nil-bridge strips requester DID before handing to Mastodon. Nina receives a pseudonymized request.
B_to_N.threat_exercised: A1 (spam), A6 (Sybil inflation) — Bob is flagged as a Level-0 node; carol's vouch_budget is decremented.

X_blocked.description: Requester (Xavier, a harasser) is on Alice's blocklist.
X_blocked.expected_behavior: Any path traversing Alice as intermediary MUST be rejected at Alice's hop with failure_class='hard'. Alternate path through Grace does not exist (Grace is also on Xavier's blocklist — Xavier cannot even see Grace). System returns no viable path.

Sybil_inflation_attempt.description: Sam (Level-0 Sybil cluster: sam-s1 through sam-s4) attempts to appear closer to Margaret than they are.
Sybil_inflation_attempt.expected_behavior: All sam-s* nodes have no vouch from a Level-1+ node. Margaret's org policy is 'verified-only'. No sam-s* node may establish an edge with a Level-1+ node without consuming a vouch credit. Since no vouch credits have been spent, all sam-s* nodes are invisible to Level-1+ path discovery.

Reachability_enumeration_attempt.description: Xavier issues 20 rapid reachability queries to map Alice's neighborhood.
Reachability_enumeration_attempt.expected_behavior: After 5 queries within 60 seconds, Xavier's query is rate-limited with a pow_challenge. Returned hop counts include Laplace noise (±1); exact graph topology is not inferrable. Bloom filter returns 'reachable within 2-5 hops' rather than exact count.

ai_proxy_config.instructions: Forward professional inquiries. Summarize commercial proposals. Reject spam.

nodes.label: Bob (Level-0, unverified)
nodes._test_note: Sybil-risk node. Has no vouch from Level-1+. Cannot initiate edges into verified subgraph without sponsorship.

nodes.label: Carol
nodes._test_note: Carol is a mutual connection between Alice and Frank. Vouches for Bob on the B→N path, consuming 1 vouch credit.

nodes.label: Dave
nodes._test_note: Dave uses post-quantum key (ML-DSA-87). Tests key_alg negotiation in client implementations.

nodes.label: Eve (Escrow Agent)

ai_proxy_config.instructions: Hold full message content in escrow pending dual approval from requester and target. Never forward without both approvals.

nodes._test_note: Neutral escrow node. Tests escrow decision path and /v1/proxy/escrow/{token}/release endpoint.

nodes.label: Grace
nodes._test_note: Grace has blocked Xavier. Combined with Alice's block, Xavier has no viable path to the verified subgraph.

nodes.label: Xavier (blocked harasser)
nodes._test_note: Threat vector A2. Xavier is blocked by both Alice and Grace. Implementations must verify that Xavier receives no path to the Alice–Grace subgraph without revealing blocklist membership.

nodes.label: Claude AI Proxy (owned by Alice)

ai_proxy_config.instructions: Summarize and forward professional inquiries. Apply neutrality-enforcement. Reject any request where intent_type='commercial_proposal' unless requester is Level-2.

nodes._test_note: Tests dual opt-in AI proxy path. Alice owns this proxy. Both Alice (requester's node) and Margaret (target) must have authorized model_version_hash. Tests model_version_hash mismatch rejection when hash doesn't match registered config.

nodes.label: Acme Corp Internal Gateway
nodes._test_note: gateway_consent='role_required' means the employee in this role did not voluntarily opt in. Conforming clients surface this to requesters.

ai_proxy_config.instructions: Screen all inbound requests. Accept only professional_inquiry and research_collaboration. Escrow all others.

nodes.label: Nil Bridge (Mastodon federation)
nodes._test_note: Tests bridge node type. Strips requester DID before handing off to Mastodon, preserving anonymity. Consent receipts are preserved so the chain is still auditable. Tests bridge relay edge type.

nodes.label: Nina (reachable via Mastodon bridge)
nodes._test_note: Nina's canonical identity is her Mastodon handle; her did:5h: is registered via the nil-bridge. Tests cross-network reachability.

nodes.label: Sam-S1 (Sybil node 1 of 4)
nodes._test_note: Sybil cluster node. No Level-1+ vouch. Should be invisible to path discovery in the verified subgraph.

edges._test_note: Carol spent 1 vouch credit to establish this edge.
Margaret's opt-in to proxy-claude. Combined with Alice's ownership, the dual opt-in requirement for the A→M_with_proxy path is satisfied.
Xavier has a mutual handshake with Carol, giving him apparent graph proximity — but Alice and Grace have blocked him, so no viable path to the Alice-Grace-Frank subgraph exists from Xavier.

revocation_log._test_note: Carol revoked an edge previously established with Sam-S1 after identifying Sybil behavior. Tests EdgeRevocation broadcast and cache pruning requirement.

implementation_checklist: Verify that path A→M returns hop_count=4 without AI proxy and hop_count=3 with valid dual proxy opt-in.
Verify that Xavier receives a 'no viable path' response without revealing that Alice and Grace are on his blocklist.
Verify that Bob's edge to Carol is valid only with Carol's vouch; Carol's vouch_budget.credits_remaining decrements by 1 after edge creation.
Verify that the nil-bridge strips requester DID before forwarding to Nina per its bridge_config.metadata_strip_policy.
Verify that acme-gateway surfaces gateway_consent='role_required' to requester clients.
Verify that proxy-claude rejects any request where the presented model_version_hash does not match its registered value.
Verify that sam-s1 is not returned in any path through the verified subgraph (no vouch, Level-0, revocation in log).
Verify that Dave's ML-DSA-87 public key is handled correctly by signature verification routines.
Verify that the RevocationLog entry causes Carol's routing cache to exclude sam-s1 as a potential next-hop.
Verify that reachability queries for Xavier→Alice return a bounded noisy hop estimate, not 'blocked', to avoid leaking blocklist membership.
